task: Perform a launch-quality rack power oversubscription risk audit using only the embedded packet. Compute priority_value = metric1 * metric2 - 0.6 * metric3 + metric4 for each record; rank records by priority_value descending but escalate any record that breaches the hard threshold first. Mark any record with contradictory or under-supported values as needs_review. Run a sensitivity check by shifting indicated metrics by sensitivity_shift_pct (5%). Produce two deliverables: rack_power_risk.xlsx (spreadsheet with formulas/executable logic, validation checks, record-level citations, and sensitivity calculations) and placement_policy.md (policy document describing methods, validation, decision logic, economic ranking using decision_budget_usd, and a final recommendation table of approve placement / require redistribution / hold / release / retest / mitigation). Do not use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; all calculations must use only the embedded packet.
